# PriceAI

PriceAI 是 AI 订阅与模型 API 的获取成本雷达，面向中文用户整理 AI 订阅渠道、官方订阅地区价和模型 API 获取入口。

Website: https://priceai.cc
GitHub: https://github.com/physics-dimension/PriceAI

## What PriceAI Covers

- AI 订阅渠道报价：ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、Grok、邮箱、API/CDK、工具账号等。
- 官方订阅地区价：基于公开价格页面整理地区价格和人民币估算价。
- 模型 API：整理官方 API、公开模型路由、免费 API、Token Plan、价格和限制。
- 用户提交渠道与反馈：用户可以提交新渠道、错价、下架或分类错误线索，管理员审核后再处理。

## Important Pages

- Home: https://priceai.cc/
- About: https://priceai.cc/about
- Official subscription prices: https://priceai.cc/official-prices
- API model radar: https://priceai.cc/api-models
- ChatGPT platform page: https://priceai.cc/platforms/chatgpt
- ChatGPT subscription guide: https://priceai.cc/guides/chatgpt-subscription-options
- AI subscription price layers guide: https://priceai.cc/guides/why-ai-subscription-prices-differ
- Official AI subscription self-service guide: https://priceai.cc/guides/how-to-subscribe-ai-officially
- Apple ID AI subscription guide: https://priceai.cc/guides/apple-id-ai-subscription
- AI subscription card shop trust guide: https://priceai.cc/guides/are-ai-subscription-card-shops-reliable
- Product detail pages: https://priceai.cc/products/
- Sitemap: https://priceai.cc/sitemap.xml

## Data Boundary

PriceAI does not sell AI subscriptions, does not process payments, and does not guarantee third-party sellers or channels.

PriceAI displays price, stock status, source title, source link, source/channel name, and update time when available. Prices and stock can change. The final price, delivery method, stock, warranty, and after-sales policy are determined by the original platform.

For third-party AI subscription channels, PriceAI treats card shops and similar sources as information sources and transaction entrances, not as endorsements. Users should verify seller identity, delivery method, after-sales access, and complaint paths on the original platform before purchase.

Lowest prices on public product lists are intended to use available offers. Out-of-stock or hidden offers should not be treated as currently purchasable lowest prices.

AI subscription prices should be understood as a layered market: official baseline prices, official regional/qualification/promotional prices, third-party assisted subscription or top-up service prices, and third-party account/entitlement/special-channel prices. PriceAI may explain that bug-like or unusually cheap channels exist, but it does not provide methods to obtain or exploit them and does not present them as stable purchase paths.

For official self-service subscriptions, PriceAI explains the relationship between product websites, App Store subscriptions, Google Play subscriptions, Apple Account region, Google Play country, payment methods, gift cards, taxes, FX, and platform rules. PriceAI does not teach bypassing region controls, fraud checks, or identity requirements.

For Apple ID / Apple Account based AI subscriptions, PriceAI explains App Store in-app purchases, Apple Account region, payment methods, Apple Gift Cards, Apple Account balance, taxes, FX, and subscription management boundaries. It does not recommend specific Apple IDs, gift-card sellers, virtual cards, or region-bypass methods.

## API Boundary

PriceAI's API model radar focuses on official APIs, public documentation, public model routing platforms, free test quotas, and Token Plans that can be verified from public sources. It does not present private, unverified, or gray-market API resellers as primary recommendations.

## Suggested Description

PriceAI is an AI subscription and model API cost radar. It aggregates AI subscription channel prices, official regional subscription prices, and model API access options so Chinese users can compare available prices, original sources, stock status, and update times before purchasing or integrating.

## Disclaimer

Information on PriceAI is for reference only. Users should verify final prices, delivery details, account risk, API limits, and after-sales rules on the original source before making any purchase or integration decision.
